subject.title: Mathematics Analysis and Approaches (AA)
subject.description:
**IB Mathematics Analysis and Approaches** is a **Group 5** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **number and algebra, functions, geometry and trigonometry, statistics and probability, and calculus**, with a strong focus on **theoretical understanding, formal mathematical reasoning, and analytical problem-solving**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2021**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| Assessment | Format | SL | HL | Weighting |
|------------|--------|----|----|-----------|
| **Paper 1** | Non-calculator written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 2** | Calculator allowed written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 3** | Calculator allowed problem-solving | N/A | 60 minutes | 20% (HL only) |
| **Mathematical Exploration** | Internal Assessment | 20 hours | 20 hours | 20% |

strengths: Clear research question linking DPI, sensitivity and comfort
Contents page and headings give an overall structure
Relevant definitions, data and formulae are all included
weaknesses: Inconsistent subsection numbering and mis-formatted figure captions
Frequent digressions (full calculator and driver screenshots) interrupt flow
Wordy narrative with repetitive and irrelevant elements
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exploration shows some coherence in the sequence of ideas but is hampered by digressions and weak links (band 2). Organization is adequate with a contents page and tables, yet numbering errors and misplaced material limit clarity (band 2). Content is mostly relevant but includes unnecessary elements and repetition, fitting band 2. Overall score: 2/4.

strengths: Variables are defined using standard notation (D, C, k)
Tables and calculator screens provide alternative representations
Working steps follow a generally logical sequence
weaknesses: Units are often omitted and formulas mis-typeset
Graphs lack axis labels, scales and legends
Explanations are brief and occasional algebraic errors reduce clarity
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The work uses some appropriate mathematical language and notation but inconsistently (band 2). There is some use of different representations, though graphs and tables need clearer labels (band 2). The logical structure is present but shallow and occasionally unclear (band 2). Overall score: 2/4.

strengths: Investigation stems from the studentâs personal gaming experience
Designs and conducts original experiment to address a genuine problem
Chooses alternative modelling methods showing good initiative
weaknesses: Mathematics remains fairly elementary and routine
Approach, while personal, is not especially innovative
Creativity is evident but does not reach exceptional depth
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: There is significant evidence of independent thinking in selecting and framing the problem (band 2). A clear personal approach is demonstrated through original data collection and practical links (band 2). The creativity and initiative shown in modelling are good but not outstanding (band 2). Overall score: 2/3.

strengths: Acknowledges measurement error and context specificity
Provides a concise summary tying findings to real-world impact
weaknesses: Reflection is limited and lacks depth
Analysis of results stops short of discussing statistical uncertainty or model choice
Evaluation of outcomes is cursory with no concrete suggestions for further work
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Reflection is confined to brief statements with limited exploration (band 1). Critical analysis is basic, noting trends but not interrogating model fit or methodology (band 1). Evaluation of outcomes is present but minimal, without future research implications (band 1). Overall score: 1/3.

strengths: Correct derivation of the constant k from data
Worked numerical example validates the model effectively
Comprehensive definitions table clarifies symbols and units
weaknesses: Dataset is small, limiting robustness of conclusions
Regression slope sign is misinterpreted and units are sometimes lost
Application remains narrow with only basic SL-level techniques
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The mathematics used is relevant and applied effectively to derive and validate the model, with mostly correct manipulation (band 4). Techniques are commensurate with course level and applied appropriately (band 4). Understanding is good, with only minor errors in regression interpretation and unit handling (band 4). Overall score: 4/6.

strandSelections.reasoning: Working steps are generally presented in a logical sequence, but explanations are brief and occasional algebraic errors (missing parentheses in 13080/(D *C)) reduce clarity.  The structure is therefore partial, matching band 2.

The student generally manipulates numbers correctly, yet the regression gradient sign is misinterpreted and units are lost in formulas.  Such slips suggest partial understanding with errors, matching band 2.

Tables, two graphs and calculator screens offer different representations, yet graphs lack scales or labelled axes and no diagram links the algebra to the geometry of turning.  The range therefore fits âsome useâ rather than âeffective useâ.

The exploration follows the sequence set out in the table of contents and ideas do progress from background to data to conclusions.  However, frequent digressions (lengthy hardware screenshots, repeated explanations of DPI, poorly-edited numbering) interrupt the flow, so the argument is only partially coherent.  Links between sections (e.g. how k is carried forward) are present but sometimes implicit or weakly justified.  This aligns with âsome coherenceâ rather than the higher descriptors.

Choosing two alternative modelling methods and constructing a constant-k model demonstrates some creativity and initiative.  However, both methods are standard and limited in scope; hence the work sits in the âgoodâ category rather than âexceptionalâ.

The analysis notes an inverse relationship and compares two modelling approaches, yet stops short of discussing goodness-of-fit, statistical uncertainty or why the linear model contradicts theory.  This is basic rather than thoughtful analysis.

Outcomes are reported (e.g., âLarge pad sufficesâ) but evaluation is cursory, with no quantitative assessment of accuracy or discussion of future research paths beyond one sentence.  Therefore only limited evaluation is evident.

Reflection is confined to brief statements on measurement error and context specificity.  There is acknowledgement but little exploration of what the findings mean or how confidence could be improved, corresponding to âlimited reflectionâ.

Variables are defined and standard notation (D, C, k) is used, but units are often omitted and the inverse-proportion formula is inconsistently typeset.  Some sentences misuse symbols inside prose.  This shows âsome appropriate mathematical languageâ, not consistent usage.

The student designs the procedure, collects original data and links results to practical decisions, showing a clear personal approach.  The approach, while individual, is not especially innovative, so band 2 is appropriate.

Essential content (definitions, data, formulae) is included, yet the write-up is wordy, repetitive and contains irrelevant narrative (e.g. full TI-84 screen dumps, Russian language driver window).  Therefore it is mostly relevant but carries noticeable unnecessary elements, placing it in band 2.

Inverse proportionality, calculation of a constant, means and a simple regression are relevant but represent low-level SL skills.  Application is narrow (three data points); hence âsome relevant mathematics with limited applicationâ (band 2).

Selecting a personal gaming problem and devising an experiment shows genuine initiative beyond the classroom example set, indicating significant independent thinking.  Nevertheless, the mathematics remains elementary, so the evidence is not âoutstandingâ.

Headings, a contents page and tables give an overall structure, yet subsections are mis-numbered, figures are inserted without captions and some material (page-long screenshots) is misplaced.  The reader can still locate information, so basic organisation exists, but the piece is not âwell organised with clear structureâ.  Band 2 best reflects this adequate but inconsistent organisation.

Most techniques (ratios, linear regression) are on-course, although nothing exceeds common GCSE level.  Consequently the work is âmostly at course levelâ rather than fully commensurate, so band 2 is chosen.

annotations.comment: The sensitivity table uses inconsistent HTML tags (<th> vs <td>) and lacks clear headings. Ensure each column is labeled and format tags consistently.
The formula âDistance = k/D * Câ is misâtypeset without parentheses, making the intended operation ambiguous. Use $$Distance = \frac{k}{D\,C}$$ if that is the intended relation.
The variable definitions table is comprehensive and clearly explains each symbol and its units, aiding the readerâs understanding.
The description of the mathematical method is overly wordy and contains grammatical errors. Rewrite for clarity, focusing on key steps and linking to the underlying proportionality principle.
Step 2 instructs three repeats for accuracy but does not explain how the mean is used. Clarify how repeated measures feed into the analysis.
The screenshot of the Russian UI is irrelevant to the mathematical exploration and should be removed or replaced with a translated summary of key settings.
Both measurement images are labeled âfig 4.â causing confusion. Ensure unique figure numbers and consistent numbering throughout.
The second measurement photo caption also repeats âfig 5â without referencing preceding figures properly. Renumber and format consistently.
The modeling table omits measured distances for some DPI settings. Include all raw data entries to support subsequent analysis.
The research question is clearly stated and focused, effectively linking DPI, sensitivity and mousepad size to comfort and efficiency in gameplay.
Subsection numbering is inconsistent (e.g. â4 1 Methodâ instead of â4.1â), disrupting the documentâs structure. Use a consistent numbering scheme across all headings.
The research objective paragraph is overly long and contains run-on sentences. Break it into shorter sentences, introduce variables earlier, and clarify the modelâs aim.
The personal rationale effectively demonstrates genuine engagement, explaining how the studentâs own gaming experience motivated the investigation.
Raw URL is included in the body text. Instead, cite the source in a reference list and paraphrase the URL details in the caption or text.
Caption uses âfig 1.â rather than a consistent âFigure 1:â. Standardize caption formatting and use full labels for clarity.
The DPI category table is clear and wellâstructured, providing an effective representation of low, medium and high DPI settings.
Graph 1 lacks axis labels and scales, making interpretation difficult. Add clear axis labels (e.g. DPI on x, Sensitivity on y) and units.
Table 3âs title and content are unclear and misaligned; the caption references âRaw dataâ but the columns show processed means. Renumber tables and clarify headings.
The derivation of the constant $$k$$ from the data point is correct and demonstrates a solid understanding of inverse proportionality.
The worked example of $$13080/(800\times0.5)=32.7\,\text{cm}$$ effectively validates the derived formula against measured data.
The linear regression model $$y=-0.01x+36.75$$ contradicts the theoretical inverse relationship. Why was a linear fit chosen over a hyperbolic model?
The TI-84 calculator screenshot is cluttered with default menus and unlabeled lists. Crop to show only relevant data and label each column.
The regression graph lacks axis labels and a legend, making the relationship unclear. Add labels for DPI (x-axis) and distance (y-axis) and units.
The limitations section mentions tool accuracy and context specificity but does not suggest future research steps. Expand with ideas for further experimentation.
The summary effectively ties together findings and highlights realâworld impact, showing thoughtful reflection on mathematics in everyday life.
References are inconsistently formatted and lack retrieval dates or publisher details. Adopt a standard style (APA or MLA) and apply it uniformly.
